commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

commit.message:
Fix momentum mismatch between holdings and scorecard

reconstructSignals (manual buy) used a different momentum formula
(raw linear scaling: absReturn * 1.2) than calculate5DayMomentum
(bucketed scoring centered at 5). A stock with +0.17% 5-day return
scored 0.2 at entry but 4.0 on the scorecard. Now reconstructSignals
delegates to calculate5DayMomentum so both use the same formula.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix $env:TEMP null on Linux containers — use GetTempPath()

$env:TEMP is not set in Linux containers, causing Join-Path to fail with
"Cannot bind argument to parameter 'Path' because it is null." Replace all
$env:TEMP references with [System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath() which returns /tmp/
on Linux regardless of environment variables.

commit.message:
Add Priority 1 benchmark files for CPU vs GPU comparison

Generated MPS/MPO files for comprehensive benchmarking:
- Heisenberg: L=8,16,24 with χ=100,150,200
- Josephson: L=10,14 with χ=100,150

Size categories:
- Small (L=8): Quick validation, <1s/sweep
- Medium (L=16): Standard benchmarks, 1-10s/sweep
- Large (L=24): Performance testing, 10-60s/sweep

Files:
- heisenberg_L8_chi100_mps.bin (1.9MB)
- heisenberg_L16_chi150_mps.bin (9.7MB)
- heisenberg_L24_chi200_mps.bin (27MB)
- josephson_L10_n2_chi100_mps.bin (6.2MB)
- josephson_L14_n2_chi150_mps.bin (21MB)
- Corresponding MPO files

Generation scripts:
- generate_benchmarks_simple.py: MPS generator
- generate_mpo_files.py: MPO generator

Seed: 42 (reproducible)

commit.message:
fix: resolve 404 on production by preserving intlMiddleware rewrite in afterAuth

The afterAuth handler was returning NextResponse.next() which overrode
the locale rewrite response from intlMiddleware in beforeAuth. When
visiting "/" with localePrefix "as-needed", intlMiddleware internally
rewrites to "/en" for the [locale] segment. NextResponse.next() replaced
this rewrite, causing Next.js to not find a route for "/" (since the
actual route is app/[locale]/page.tsx), resulting in a 404.

Fix: return void instead of NextResponse.next() so the intlMiddleware
response from beforeAuth is preserved through Clerk's authMiddleware.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: remove iOS ccache — in-place wrapper hangs CMake configure

The in-place Xcode clang wrapper approach (same as Android NDK) causes
CMake configure to hang on iOS. Multiple approaches tried and failed:
- CMAKE_XCODE_ATTRIBUTE_CC: loses cross-compilation flags
- Wrapper scripts: build hangs
- In-place binary wrapping: CMake configure hangs

iOS builds will run without ccache for now.

fix: use Optional[date] for Pydantic fields where field name shadows type

The `date: date | None` pattern fails in Pydantic v2 on Python 3.12 because
the field name `date` shadows the imported `date` type during class body eval.

Update vcg_results.md: mark Hamiltonian scaling resolved via WHT

was expensive beyond n≈12. WHT resolves this; update the note to
reflect the new bottleneck (truth table + optimisation).

commit.message:
Skip duplicate timelapse frames via MD5 hash comparison

Some cameras (e.g. Heia) update their image every ~2 min but we capture
every 1 min, storing identical frames. This made the player appear to
skip frames when stepping. Now compares MD5 of each capture to the last
saved frame and skips if identical.

commit.message:
Add error handling, input validation, PII-safe logging, and tests

Server: wrap all endpoints in try/except returning JSON 500 errors,
add 10MB upload limit and empty-file validation, replace print with
structured logging (timestamps, timing per step, no user text in logs
or error responses). Watch: surface audio player/recorder errors to UI
via @Published lastError properties. Add 24 pytest unit tests covering
all endpoints, validation, error paths, and PII safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

SEO audit fixes: domain consistency, meta tags, schema, and contact info

- Fix domain mismatch: all URLs now use kidsscenter.com (matching CNAME)
- Shorten title tag (130→59 chars) and meta description (320→150 chars)
- Remove phantom service URLs and fragment URLs from sitemap.xml
- Update sitemap lastmod to current date
- Remove SearchAction schema (no search functionality exists)
- Remove fb:app_id placeholder
- Align visible FAQ text with JSON-LD schema (0-17 years)
- Add WhatsApp phone number to schema, contact section, and footer
- Self-host Unsplash image, remove external dependency
- Change schema type from LocalBusiness to EducationalOrganization
- Update OG/Twitter image to existing logo.webp
- Update copyright year to 2026

feat: add standalone JPK XML file validator mode

- Add mode ('conversion'|'validation') to appStore with validationXml state
- Add validateExistingJpk() with 4-level validation: structure, NIP checksum, control sums, XSD
- Add "Waliduj plik JPK XML" collapsible section in ImportStep with file picker and type auto-detection
- Split ValidationStep into ConversionValidationView and StandaloneValidationView based on mode
- Add detectJpkLabel() for extracting JPK type label from XML
- 30 new tests covering all validation levels, edge cases, and label detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.4.2: Code review fixes, bug fixes, and housekeeping

Address all issues from comprehensive code review:
- Fix recipe yield parsing (craft_yield from Garland, used in pricing)
- Fix cross-world mode to use per-world robust averages instead of max sale
- Add thread-safe rate limiting with threading.Lock for both APIs
- Extract fetch_prices_lightweight() to universalis.py (dedup discover/gather)
- Add reload_seeds() function, remove direct print() from scrape helpers
- Optimize namespace_age() to O(1) with _last_updated.json metadata

Bug fixes:
- Fix gather mode level always showing 0 (node items lack lvl field)
- Fix gather mode Gil/day and velocity sorting as strings (use raw numbers + JS format)
- Filter out unnamed items from gather results
- Add Clear Cache button to GUI header

Housekeeping:
- Add pyproject.toml with optional gui/dev dependency groups
- Add 20 unit tests for pricing logic (robust_average, ingredient costs, margins)
- Import gil() from scanner.output instead of redefining in app.py
